alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices & Services with two promotions, scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; product ownership experience spanning requirements, logic design, UAT, and rollout
alignments.job_requirement: Be a trusted advisor to customers and drive their AI strategies; build, design and refine conversational AI agents

alignments.candidate_evidence: Demonstrated ability to lead transformation programs and scale operations globally at Google; documented experience managing multiple complex initiatives
alignments.job_requirement: Drive execution and delivery of multiple complex, high-visibility agent development projects

alignments.candidate_evidence: Global operations scaling experience with cross-functional stakeholder management; product transformation work requiring alignment across teams
alignments.job_requirement: Coordinate across technical and non-technical stakeholders through the full development lifecycle; ensure clear communication

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations background with emphasis on transformation; eight-year tenure with two promotions indicates demonstrated insight contribution at scale
alignments.job_requirement: Contribute data-driven, strategic insights to customer and internal decisions

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product operations experience from ownership, requirements, and design perspective; conversational AI and agent development are emerging new domains for the candidate
alignments.job_requirement: Strong understanding of software development, product management and engineering principles to act as strategic partner

gaps.gap: No direct conversational AI or agent development experience; domain is new
gaps.mitigation: Rapid onboarding and product immersion typical for strategist roles; transferable product lifecycle and stakeholder management skills from Google enable fast ramp

gaps.gap: Limited native product management or software engineering production background to serve as technical peer to engineers
gaps.mitigation: Strategist roles emphasize advisory and coordination rather than hands-on engineering; customer insight and project leadership can compensate

gaps.gap: No stated consulting or classic case-team background; advisory credibility in new domain requires trust-building
gaps.mitigation: Google brand and demonstrated transformation leadership provide strong credibility foundation for customer advisory work

output.level_rationale: Strategist role with stated agent development ownership, cross-functional coordination, and customer advisory scope. JD emphasizes leadership of complex projects and stakeholder management without explicit manager-of-managers language. No prior company stage or hiring band stated; cofounder/VC-backed AI platform context suggests growth-stage environment. Estimated L5 mid-level IC/lead.
output.summary: Strong fit for Agent Strategist at Sierra: candidate brings eight years of Google-scale transformation and product operations leadership, with proven cross-functional coordination and customer insight generation. Primary gaps are domain novelty (conversational AI/agents) and lack of hands-on engineering depth, both manageable through rapid product immersion and reliance on core strategist strengths in execution, stakeholder alignment, and business problem-solving.
uncertainties: Company stage/maturity not stated; cofounder backgrounds suggest growth-stage VC (affects team dynamics and pace expectations)
No mention of Italian-language requirement strength or candidate's Italian fluency in profile
Conversational design and agent development learning curve not quantified; depends on product complexity and onboarding rigor
